Get Started
Claude for Healthcare

Administrative AI That
Actually Saves Time.

Healthcare businesses spend as much time on paperwork as patient care. Claude handles the documentation, communication, and training content so your team can focus on what matters.

Get Claude Implemented → How It Works
An important note
Claude in these workflows handles zero PHI. Everything we build is for administrative operations, marketing, and internal communications — not clinical workflows, patient records, or anything touching protected health information. These are business-side systems designed to reduce admin burden on your team.
The healthcare admin problem

The clinical work is what you trained for.
The admin work is what fills your days.

📋
Documentation burden
Policies, procedures, intake forms, referral letters — the writing never stops and it's never anyone's full-time focus.
💬
Patient communication templates
Every follow-up sequence, appointment reminder, and care instruction gets written and rewritten from scratch.
📝
Prior auth writing
Insurance prior authorization letters require detailed, structured writing. It takes time your clinical staff doesn't have.
🎓
Staff training materials
Onboarding docs, compliance training content, procedure guides — always behind, always outdated, always a scramble.
What Claude handles

Six admin workflows Claude
takes off your plate.

01
Patient Intake Summary Docs
Structured intake summary templates that give your clinical team consistent, complete information — without your admin staff spending an hour on every new patient.
02
Referral Letter Drafting
Claude drafts referral letters from structured inputs — your staff reviews and sends. What used to take 20 minutes takes 3.
03
Policy & Procedure Documentation
New policies, updated procedures, compliance documentation — Claude drafts from your inputs so your team edits instead of starts from nothing.
04
Staff Training Content
Onboarding guides, role-specific training materials, compliance refreshers — built by Claude, reviewed by your team, used by your staff.
05
Billing Dispute Letters
Structured, professional billing dispute correspondence drafted by Claude — consistent format, faster turnaround, less back-and-forth.
06
Appointment Follow-Up Sequences
Post-visit follow-up emails, care instruction reminders, and reactivation sequences — built once, running automatically, personalized by appointment type.
How it works

Audit. Build. Optimize.

Three steps from fragmented admin chaos to Claude running your documentation and communication systems.

1
AI Audit — $1,500
We map the highest-friction admin workflows in your practice or healthcare business. You leave with a prioritized implementation plan. Learn about the Audit →
2
Implementation — from $3,500
We build the Claude workflows your team will use — connected to your existing tools, tested with your actual content. See Implementation details →
3
Retainer — $1,200/mo
Ongoing support as your practice grows and your workflows evolve. New documents added, existing ones refined. Retainer details →
Start with an AI Audit → Claude for Small Business →
Common use cases

What healthcare businesses use Claude for.

Intake Summary Templates Referral Letters Policy Documentation Staff Training Content Billing Dispute Letters Follow-Up Sequences Care Instructions Onboarding Guides
